entry.title: 07_StackWithTwoQueues
entry.content:
07_StackWithTwoQueues这个是剑指 offer 第 7 个的延伸问题。使用两个队列实现一个栈。实现 appendTail 和 deleteTail， 分别完成在队尾插入结点和队列头部删除结点功能。一定要画图，多多揣摩！！！ 头文件123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475// 剑指offer// 07_StackWithTwoQueues.h// chenyu// 2019_08_09#include <queue>#include <stdexcept>template <typename T> class CStack{public: CStack(); ~CStack(); void appendTail(const T& node); T deleteTail();private: std::queue<T> queue1; std::queue<T> queue2;};template <typename T> CStack<T>::CStack(){}template <typename T> CStack<T>::~CStack(){}template <typename T> void CStack<T>::appendTail(const T& node){ if(!queue2.empty()) queue2.push(node); else { queue1.push(node); }}template <typename T> T CStack<T>::deleteTail(){ T tail; if(queue2.empty()) { while(queue1.size() > 1) // 保留最后一个值，queue 最后进的值先出 { T& data = queue1.front(); queue1.pop(); queue2.push(data); } tail = queue1.front(); if(queue1.size() == 0) throw std::runtime_error("queue is empty"); queue1.pop(); } else { while(queue2.size() > 1) // 保留最后一个值，queue 最后进的值先出 { T& data = queue2.front(); queue2.pop(); queue1.push(data); } tail = queue2.front(); if(queue2.size() == 0) throw std::runtime_error("queue is empty"); queue2.pop(); } return tail;} 源代码12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637// 剑指offer// 07_StackWithTwoQueues.cpp// chenyu// 2019_08_09// 使用两个队列实现一个栈。// 实现 appendTail 和 deleteTail// 分别完成在队尾插入结点和队列头部删除结点功能#include "07_StackWithTwoQueues.h"/************ test ***********/int main(){ CStack <char> stack; stack.appendTail('a'); stack.appendTail('b'); stack.appendTail('c'); char tail = stack.deleteTail(); printf("delete tail 1 is: %c
", tail); // c tail = stack.deleteTail(); printf("delete tail 2 is: %c
", tail); // b stack.appendTail('d'); tail = stack.deleteTail(); printf("delete tail 3 is: %c
", tail); // d stack.appendTail('e'); tail = stack.deleteTail(); printf("delete tail 4 is: %c
", tail); // e tail = stack.deleteTail(); printf("delete tail 5 is: %c
", tail); // a return 0;} output123456PS E:\Buffer\C++_code\CondingInterview_cy> .\07_StackWithTwoQueues.exedelete tail 1 is: cdelete tail 2 is: bdelete tail 3 is: ddelete tail 4 is: edelete tail 5 is: a

entry.title: 06_ConstructBinaryTree
05_PrintListInReversedOrder
04_ReplaceSpaces
entry.content:
04_ReplaceSpaces.cpp1. 题目 替换空格请实现一个函数，把字符串中的每个空格替换成”%20”。例如输入“We are happy.” 则输出“We%20are%20happy.”。 2. 解析复杂度为 O(n)，先遍历一次字符串，就可以统计出字符串中空格的总数，并计算出替换之后的字符串的总长度。然后从字符串的后面开始复制和替换，用两个指针。不要从前面，否则复杂度会 $O(n^2)$. 3. 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111112113114115116117118119120121122123// 剑指offer // 04_ReplaceSpaces.cpp// chenyu// 2019_08_03// We are happy. -> We%20are%20haooy.// 字符串包括空格// 字符串不包括空格// 特殊输入（字符串是NULL指针、空字符串、只有一个空格字符、只有连续多个空格）#include <iostream>const int max_length = 100;void Replace(char str[], int max_length){ if(str == nullptr || max_length <= 0) return; int raw_len = 0; int spaces_cnt = 0; // raw_len 原字符串实际长度 while(str[raw_len] != '\0') { if(str[raw_len] == ' ') ++spaces_cnt; ++raw_len; } raw_len = raw_len + 1; // while 中的 raw_len 是从 0 开始，所以长度要加一 int new_len = raw_len + spaces_cnt * 2; // ' ' -> %20 int raw_index = raw_len - 1, new_index = new_len - 1; // 索引是长度减一 if(new_index > max_length) return; while (raw_index != new_index) // (raw_index >= 0 && new_index > raw_index) { if(str[raw_index] != ' ') str[new_index--] = str[raw_index]; else { // 当执行替换后，new_index 要在 % 之前 // 所以不能用 //str[new_index] = '0'; //str[--new_index] = '2'; //str[--new_index] = '%'; str[new_index--] = '0'; str[new_index--] = '2'; str[new_index--] = '%'; } --raw_index; }}/************ test ***********/void Print(char *testname, char str[], int max_length){ if(testname != nullptr) printf("%s is begin
", testname); if(str != nullptr && max_length > 0) { printf("The raw is : %s
", str); Replace(str, max_length); printf("The new is : %s
", str); }}// 字符串包括空格void Test1(){ char str[max_length] = " We are happy "; Print("Test1", str, max_length);}// 字符串包括连续多个空格void Test2(){ char str[max_length] = " We are happy "; Print("Test2", str, max_length);}// 字符串不包括空格void Test3(){ char str[max_length] = "Wearehappy"; Print("Test3", str, max_length);}// 特殊输入（字符串是NULL指针）void Test4(){ Print("Test4", nullptr, max_length);}// 特殊输入（字符串只有一个空格字符）void Test5(){ char str[max_length] = " "; Print("Test5", str, max_length);}// 特殊输入（字符串只有一个空格字符）void Test6(){ char str[] = ""; Print("Test6", str, max_length);}// 特殊输入（字符串只有连续多个空格）void Test7(){ char str[max_length] = " "; Print("Test7", str, max_length);}int main(){ Test1(); Test2(); Test3(); Test4(); Test5(); Test6(); Test7(); return 0;} output1234567891011121314151617181920PS E:\Buffer\C++_code\CondingInterview_cy> .\04_ReplaceSpaces.exeTest1 is beginThe raw is : We are happyThe new is : %20We%20are%20happy%20Test2 is beginThe raw is : We are happyThe new is : %20%20We%20%20are%20%20happy%20%20Test3 is beginThe raw is : WearehappyThe new is : WearehappyTest4 is beginTest5 is beginThe raw is :The new is : %20Test6 is beginThe raw is :The new is :Test7 is beginThe raw is :The new is : %20%20%20

entry.title: 03_FindInPartiallySortedMatrix
entry.content:
03_FindInPartiallySortedMatrix1. 题目 二维数组中的查找在一个二维数组中，每一行都按照从左到右递增的顺序排序，每一列都按照从上到下递增的顺序排序。请完成一个函数，输入这样的一个二维数组和一个整数，判断数组中是否含有该整数。例如下面的二维数组就是每行、每列都递增排序。如果在这个数组中查找数字7，则返回true；如果查找数字5，由于数组不含有该数字，则返回false。\1   2    8   9\2   4   9   12\4   7   10  13\6   8   11  15 2. 解析数组是有序排列，左上到右下逐渐增大。比较 num 和右上角数的大小，若 num 大则行加一，若 num 小则列减一。 3. 代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172// 剑指offer // 03_FindInPartiallySortedMatrix.cpp// chenyu// 2019_07_30#include<iostream>bool Find(int* matrix, int rows, int columns, int num){ bool found = false; if(matrix != nullptr && rows>0 && columns>0) { int row = 0; int column = columns-1; while (row < rows && column >= 0) { if(matrix[row*columns + column] == num) { found = true; break; } else if(matrix[row*columns + column] > num) --column; else ++row; } } return found;}/************ test ***********/void Print(char* name, int* matrix, int rows, int columns, int num){ if(name != nullptr) printf("%s is begin
", name); bool result = Find(matrix, rows, columns, num); if(result) printf("YES
"); else printf("NO
");}// 二维数组中包含查找的数字// 1 2 8 9// 2 4 9 12// 4 7 10 13// 6 8 11 15void Test1(){ int matrix[4][4] = {{1, 2, 8, 9}, {2, 4, 9, 12}, {4, 7, 10, 13}, {6, 8, 11, 15}}; Print("Test1", (int*)matrix, 4, 4, 7);}// 二维数组中没有查找的数字void Test2(){ int matrix[4][4] = {{1, 2, 8, 9}, {2, 4, 9, 12}, {4, 7, 10, 13}, {6, 8, 11, 15}}; Print("Test2", (int*)matrix, 4, 4, 17);}// 特殊输入，空指针void Test3(){ Print("Test3", nullptr, 4, 4, 7);}int main(){ Test1(); Test2(); Test3(); return 0;} output 1234567PS E:\Buffer\C++_code\CondingInterview_cy> .\03_FindInPartiallySortedMatrix.exeTest1 is beginYESTest2 is beginNOTest3 is beginNO

entry.title: 01_AssignmentOperator
entry.content:
01_AssignmentOperator1. 题目 赋值运算符函数如下为类型 CMyString 的声明，请为该类型添加赋值运算符函数。12345678910class CMyString{public: CMyString(char* pData = nullptr); CMyString(const CMyString& str); ~CMyString(void);private: char* m_pData;}; 2. 解析new 的结果是从堆中划分一块区域，动态创建一个类型的数据，最后返回该区域的指针。调用 strcpy 操作时把这块内存的地址传了进来，然后才这个地址开始复制 str.m_pData 的内容，如果不是用 new 操作的话，就会从 m_pData 指针指向的位置开始复制 str.m_pData 的内容，这样，如果 m_pData 是一个空指针或者指向一个不确定的位置，就会出现错误，因为修改一个不确定的位置的值是未定义的，不合法，new操作之后相当于得到了一段属于自己的内存空间，而 m_pData 指向这段空间的初始地址，所以可以对它进行赋值操作 3. 代码 剑指offer // 01_AssignmentOperator.cpp// chenyu// 2019_07_30#include <cstdio>#include <cstring>class CMyString{public: CMyString(char* pData = nullptr); CMyString(const CMyString& str); ~CMyString(); void Print(); CMyString& operator =(const CMyString &str);private: char* m_pData;};CMyString::CMyString(char* pData){ if(pData == nullptr) { m_pData = new char[1]; // 长度为1 m_pData[0] = '\0'; } else { m_pData = new char[strlen(pData)+1]; strcpy(m_pData, pData); }}CMyString::CMyString(const CMyString& str){ m_pData = new char[strlen(str.m_pData)+1]; strcpy(m_pData, str.m_pData);}CMyString::~CMyString(){ delete [] m_pData;}void CMyString::Print(){ printf("%s", m_pData);}/*// 传统，法一CMyString& CMyString::operator =(const CMyString &str){ if(this == &str) return *this; delete [] m_pData; m_pData = nullptr; m_pData = new char[strlen(str.m_pData)+1]; strcpy(m_pData, str.m_pData); return *this;}*//*// 法二CMyString& CMyString::operator =(const CMyString &str){ if(this == &str) return *this; char* ptemp = new char[strlen(str.m_pData)+1]; delete [] m_pData; m_pData = nullptr; m_pData = ptemp; strcpy(m_pData, str.m_pData); return *this;}*/// 法三，临时变量在if运行完就会自动调用析构，释放内存CMyString& CMyString::operator =(const CMyString &str){ if(this != &str) { CMyString strtemp(str); char* ptemp = strtemp.m_pData; strtemp.m_pData = m_pData; m_pData = ptemp; // 不能用下面一行代替上面代码 // 因为分配新内存之前，要释放之前已有的空间，避免内存泄漏 //m_pData = str.m_pData; } return *this;}/************ test ***********/// 把一个 CMyString 实例赋值给另一个实例void Test1(){ printf("Test one begin
"); char* test = "Hello test1"; CMyString str1(test); CMyString str2; str2 = str1; printf("The expected result is: %s.
", test); printf("The actual result is: "); str2.Print(); printf("
");}// 把一个 CMyString 实例赋值给它自己void Test2(){ printf("Test two begin
"); char* test = "Hello test2"; CMyString str1(test); str1 = str1; printf("The expected result is: %s.
", test); printf("The actual result is: "); str1.Print(); printf("
");}// 连续赋值void Test3(){ printf("Test three begin
"); char* test = "Hello test3"; CMyString str1(test); CMyString str2, str3; str3 = str2 = str1; printf("The expected result is: %s.
", test); printf("The actual result is: "); str2.Print(); printf("str2 end 
"); str3.Print(); printf("str3 end 
");}int main(){ Test1(); Test2(); Test3(); return 0;} output1234567891011PS E:\Buffer\C++_code\CondingInterview_cy> .\01_AssignmentOperator.exeTest one beginThe expected result is: Hello test1.The actual result is: Hello test1Test two beginThe expected result is: Hello test2.The actual result is: Hello test2Test three beginThe expected result is: Hello test3.The actual result is: Hello test3str2 endHello test3str3 end

entry.title: 01_最大子序列和
entry.content: 原本是不想整理的，还是好记性不如烂笔头，就准备把后续的东西也记下来。 1. 问题概述在一个序列中，求出最大子序列的和，比如序列1-1, 3, -2, 4, -6, 1, 6, -1 其最大子序列为11, 6 和为7。 2. 解决算法2.1 解法1——$O(N^2)$（在这里复杂度为 $O(N^3)$ 的算法就不再赘述了，可能初学者第一想到的是 $O(N^2)$ 算法）直接刚，两次循环遍历求最大。代码如下所示：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627#include <iostream>const int N = 8;int MaxSubSum(const int A[], int N);int main(){ using namespace std; int A[N] = {-1, 3, -2, 4, -6, 1, 6, -1}; cout << "The max sub sequence sum is: " << MaxSubSum(A, N) << endl; return 0;}int MaxSubSum(const int A[], int N){ int ThisSum; // 当前最大子序列和 int MaxSum = 0; for (int i=0; i<N; i++) { ThisSum = 0; for (int j=i; j<N; j++) { ThisSum += A[j]; if (ThisSum > MaxSum) MaxSum = ThisSum; } } return MaxSum;} 当 i = 0 时，j 从 0 开始往后依次求和，每加一个值，就保存至当前 ThisSum，如果 ThisSum > MaxSum，则此时更新 MaxSum。根据下图可以看到在第一轮循环中，MaxSum = 5. 当 i = 1 时，j 从 1 开始往后依次求和，当累加到 6 时， ThisSum > MaxSum，更新 MaxSum。 。。。以此类推，直到找到最大值。 当 i = 5 时，最大值为 7。 所以最后程序输出结果如下：12PS E:\Buffer\C++_code> .\test.exeThe max sub sequence sum is: 7 2.2 解法2——$O(NlogN)$分而治之，将此问题拆分，即最大子序列和可能在三个地方出现：或者整个出现在输入数据的左半部，或者整个出现在右半部，或者跨越输入数据的中部从而占据左右两半部分。前两种情况，可以用递归依次求解。最后一种情况可通过求出前半部分的最大和以及后半部分最大和而得到，然后将其相加。代码如下：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657#include <iostream>const int N = 8;int MaxSubSum3(const int A[], int Left, int Right);int Max3(int a, int b, int c);int MaxSubSum(const int A[], int N);int main(){ using namespace std; int A[N] = {-1, 3, -2, 4, -6, 1, 6, -1}; cout << "The max sub sequence sum is: \n" << MaxSubSum(A, N) << endl; return 0;}int MaxSubSum3(const int A[], int Left, int Right){ int Center, CenterLeft_Sum=0, CenterRight_Sum=0; int CenterLeft_MaxSum = 0, CenterRight_MaxSum = 0; int Left_MaxSum, Right_MaxSum; if (Left == Right) // 此时子序列只有一个元素，当该元素非负时，它就是最大和子序列 //if (A[Left] > 0) return A[Left]; //else // return 0; // 递归，左右两边最大和子序列 Center = (Left + Right)/2; Left_MaxSum = MaxSubSum3(A, Left, Center); Right_MaxSum = MaxSubSum3(A, Center+1, Right); // 包含两边跨越中间的最大和子序列 for (int i=Center; i>=Left; i--) // 左扫 { CenterLeft_Sum += A[i]; if (CenterLeft_Sum > CenterLeft_MaxSum) CenterLeft_MaxSum = CenterLeft_Sum; } for (int i=Center+1; i<=Right; i++) // 右扫 { CenterRight_Sum += A[i]; if (CenterRight_Sum > CenterRight_MaxSum) CenterRight_MaxSum = CenterRight_Sum; } std::cout << "lef " << Left_MaxSum << "; ri " << Right_MaxSum << "; ce " << CenterLeft_MaxSum+CenterRight_MaxSum << std::endl; return Max3(Left_MaxSum, Right_MaxSum, CenterLeft_MaxSum+CenterRight_MaxSum);}int Max3(int a, int b, int c){ int max; max = a > b ? a : b; max = max > c ? max : c; return max;}int MaxSubSum(const int A[], int N) // 封装{ return MaxSubSum3(A, 0, N-1);} 整体思路如下： 输出结果如下：12345678910PS E:\Buffer\C++_code> .\test.exeThe max sub sequence sum is:lef -1; ri 3; ce 3lef -2; ri 4; ce 4lef 3; ri 4; ce 5lef -6; ri 1; ce 1lef 6; ri -1; ce 6lef 1; ri 6; ce 7lef 5; ri 7; ce 67 复杂度T(N)总体复杂度设为 T(N)，左边迭代复杂度 = 右边 = T(N/2)，跨越中部占据两边的复杂度为 O(N)。$T(N)=T(N/2)+T(N/2)+c\cdot N \\=2[T(N/2^2)+T(N/2^2)+\frac{c\cdot N}{2}]+c\cdot N \\= 2^2T(N/2^2)+2cN \\··· \\= 2^kT(N/2^k)+kcN, 2^k=N \\= 2^kO(1)+ckN \\= O(N logN)$ 2.3 解法3——$O(N)$逐步计算累加子序列和，如果小于 0 抛弃，在累加中不断更新 MaxSum 的值。代码如下：12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728#include <iostream>const int N = 8;int MaxSubSum(const int A[], int N);int main(){ using namespace std; int A[N] = {-1, 3, -2, 4, -6, 1, 6, -1}; cout << "The max sub sequence sum is: \n" << MaxSubSum(A, N) << endl; return 0;}int MaxSubSum(const int A[], int N) { int ThisSum = 0, MaxSum = 0; for (int i=0; i<N; i++) { ThisSum += A[i]; if (ThisSum > MaxSum) { std::cout << "This: " << ThisSum << "; Max: " << MaxSum << std::endl; MaxSum = ThisSum; } else if (ThisSum < 0) // 当子列和为负，抛弃 ThisSum = 0; } return MaxSum;} 整体思路如下图所示： 结果如下：1234567891011PS E:\Buffer\C++_code> .\test.exeThe max sub sequence sum is:This: -1; Max: 0This: 3; Max: 0This: 1; Max: 3This: 5; Max: 3This: -1; Max: 5This: 1; Max: 5This: 7; Max: 5This: 6; Max: 77

entry.title: Chapter11_Programming practice Plus
entry.content:
11.1代码 vect.h#ifndef VECT_H_#define VECT_H_#include <iostream>namespace VECTOR{ class Vector { public: // RECT for rectangular, POL for Polar modes enum Mode {RECT, POL}; private: double x; // horizontal value double y; // vertical value double mag; // length of vector double ang; // direction of vector in degrees Mode mode; // private methods for setting values void set_mag(); void set_ang(); void set_x(); void set_y(); public: Vector(); Vector(double n1, double n2, Mode form=RECT); ~Vector(); void reset(double n1, double n2, Mode form=RECT); double xval() const {return x;} // report x value double yval() const {return y;} double magval() const {return mag;} // report magnitude double angval() const {return ang;} void polar_mode(); // set mode to POL void rect_mode(); // set mode to RECT // operator overloading Vector operator+(const Vector &b) const; Vector operator-(const Vector &b) const; Vector operator-() const; Vector operator*(double n) const; // friend friend Vector operator*(double n, const Vector &a); friend std::ostream & operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Vector &v); };};#endif// vect.cpp#include "vect.h"#include <cmath>using std::sqrt;using std::sin;using std::cos;using std::atan;using std::atan2; // 返回单位是弧度 (-pi, pi]using std::cout;namespace VECTOR{ // compute degrees in one radian // should be about 57.29 const double Rad_to_deg = 45.0 / atan(1.0); // 角度*pi/180° = 弧度 // private methods // calculates magnitude from x and y void Vector::set_mag() { mag = sqrt(x*x + y*y); } void Vector::set_ang() { if (x==0.0 && y==0.0) ang = 0.0; else ang = atan2(y, x); } // set x, y from polar coordinate void Vector::set_x() { x = mag*cos(ang); } void Vector::set_y() { y = mag*sin(ang); } // public methods Vector::Vector() { x = y = mag = ang = 0.0; mode = RECT; } // construct vector from rectangular coordinates if form is r // (the default) or else from polar coordinates if forms is p Vector::Vector(double n1, double n2, Mode form) { mode = form; if (mode == RECT) { x = n1; y = n2; set_mag(); set_ang(); } else if (mode == POL) { mag = n1; ang = n2 / Rad_to_deg; // 弧度 set_x(); set_y(); } else { cout << "Incorrect 2rd argument to Vector() -- "; cout << "vector set to 0
"; x = y = mag = ang = 0.0; mode = RECT; } } // reset vector from rectangular coordinates if form is // RECT (the default) or else from polar coordinates if // form is POL void Vector::reset(double n1, double n2, Mode form) { mode = form; if (mode == RECT) { x = n1; y = n2; set_mag(); set_ang(); } else if (mode == POL) { mag = n1; ang = n2 / Rad_to_deg; // 弧度 set_x(); set_y(); } else { cout << "Incorrect 2rd argument to Vector() -- "; cout << "vector set to 0
"; x = y = mag = ang = 0.0; mode = RECT; } } Vector::~Vector() {} void Vector::polar_mode() { mode = POL; } void Vector::rect_mode() { mode = RECT; } // operator overloading // add two Vectors Vector Vector::operator+(const Vector &b) const { return Vector(x+b.x, y+b.y); } // subtract Vector b from a Vector Vector::operator-(const Vector &b) const { return Vector(x-b.x, y-b.y); } // reverse sign of Vector Vector Vector::operator-() const { return Vector(-x, -y); } // multiplay vector by n Vector Vector::operator*(double n) const { return Vector(n*x, n*y); } // friend methods // multiply n by Vector a Vector operator*(double n, const Vector &a) { return a*n; } // display rectangular coordinate if mode is RECT, // else display polar coordinates if mode is POL std::ostream & operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Vector &v) { if (v.mode == Vector::RECT) // 友元不在类作用域内，而在名称空间中，所以只加类限定 os << "(x, y) = (" << v.x << ", " << v.y << ")"; else if (v.mode == Vector::POL) os << "(m, a) = (" << v.mag << ", " << v.ang*Rad_to_deg <<")"; else os << "Vector object mode is invalid"; return os; }}// prj_11_1.cpp#include "vect.h"#include <iostream>#include <ctime> // time() prototype#include <cstdlib> // rand(), srand() prototype#include <fstream>int main(){ using namespace std; using VECTOR::Vector; ofstream fout; fout.open("thewalk.txt"); srand(time(0)); // seed random-number generator double direction; Vector step; Vector result(0.0, 0.0); unsigned long steps = 0; double target; double dstep; int count = 0; cout << "Enter target distance (q to quit): "; while (cin>>target) { cout << "Enter step length: "; if (!(cin>>dstep)) break; fout << "Target Distance: " << target << ", Step Size: " << dstep << endl; while (result.magval() < target) { fout << count++ << "： " << result << endl; direction = rand() % 360; // 余数<360°，所以在[0°,360°)之间随机取值 step.reset(dstep, direction, Vector::POL); result = result + step; steps++; } fout << "After " << steps << " steps, the subject " "has the following location:
"; fout << result << endl; result.polar_mode(); fout << " or
" << result << endl; fout << "Average outward distance per step = " << result.magval()/steps << endl; steps = 0; result.reset(0.0, 0.0); cout << "Enter target distance (q to quit): "; } cout << "Bye!
"; cin.clear(); while (cin.get() != '
') continue; return 0;} 运行结果12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546PS E:\Buffer\C++_code> .\prj_11_1.exeEnter target distance (q to quit): 100Enter step length: 20Enter target distance (q to quit): qBye!----------------thewalk.txtTarget Distance: 100, Step Size: 200： (x, y) = (0, 0)1： (x, y) = (3.81618, -19.6325)2： (x, y) = (-3.99844, -1.22245)3： (x, y) = (15.7553, -4.35114)4： (x, y) = (23.8901, -22.622)5： (x, y) = (43.3775, -18.123)6： (x, y) = (46.1609, -37.9284)7： (x, y) = (27.1398, -31.748)8： (x, y) = (11.8189, -18.8923)9： (x, y) = (25.961, -33.0344)10： (x, y) = (32.4724, -14.1241)11： (x, y) = (17.6095, -27.5067)12： (x, y) = (-2.24142, -29.9441)13： (x, y) = (2.59702, -49.35)14： (x, y) = (-16.4241, -43.1696)15： (x, y) = (-33.5675, -53.4704)16： (x, y) = (-42.6473, -35.6503)17： (x, y) = (-52.0367, -17.9913)18： (x, y) = (-45.5253, 0.919061)19： (x, y) = (-62.4863, -9.67932)20： (x, y) = (-42.8538, -13.4955)21： (x, y) = (-38.0153, 5.91041)22： (x, y) = (-23.8732, -8.23172)23： (x, y) = (-43.8458, -9.27844)24： (x, y) = (-35.0783, -27.2543)25： (x, y) = (-47.9341, -42.5752)26： (x, y) = (-43.7759, -23.0123)27： (x, y) = (-63.0944, -28.1886)28： (x, y) = (-82.8482, -25.06)29： (x, y) = (-68.4614, -38.9531)30： (x, y) = (-81.0478, -23.4102)31： (x, y) = (-95.6748, -9.77023)32： (x, y) = (-80.8119, -23.1528)After 33 steps, the subject has the following location:(x, y) = (-99.7223, -16.6415) or(m, a) = (101.101, -170.526)Average outward distance per step = 3.06368 11.2 略 11.3代码1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465// vect.h 同 11.1// vect.cpp 同 11.1 // prj_11_3.cpp#include <iostream>#include <ctime> // time() prototype#include <cstdlib> // rand(), srand() prototype#include "vect.h" // .h 最好放在最后一个 include，否则 friend iostream 相关会有报错int main(){ using namespace std; using VECTOR::Vector; srand(time(0)); // seed random-number generator double direction; Vector step; Vector result(0.0, 0.0); unsigned long steps = 0; unsigned long max_steps = 0; unsigned long min_steps = -1; unsigned long total_steps = 0; double ave_steps = 0.0; int N; double target; double dstep; cout << "Enter target distance (q to quit): "; while (cin>>target) { cout << "Enter step length: "; if (!(cin>>dstep)) break; cout << "Enter the test num: "; if (!(cin>>N)) break; // 下一轮输入时，对相关参数初始化 max_steps = 0; min_steps = -1; total_steps = 0; for (int i=1; i<=N; i++) { steps = 0; result.reset(0.0, 0.0); while (result.magval() < target) { direction = rand() % 360; // 余数<360°，所以在[0°,360°)之间随机取值 step.reset(dstep, direction, Vector::POL); result = result + step; steps++; } total_steps += steps; if (steps > max_steps) max_steps = steps; if (steps < min_steps) // 这样分开写的好处是，防止后面的 steps 都大于 max，如果是 else 那么 min 不会执行 min_steps = steps; } ave_steps = (double)total_steps/N; cout << "the max step is: " << max_steps << endl; cout << "the min step is: " << min_steps << endl; cout << "the ave step is: " << ave_steps << endl; cout << "Enter target distance (q to quit): "; } cout << "Bye!
"; cin.clear(); while (cin.get() != '
') continue; return 0;} 运行结果12345678910111213PS E:\Buffer\C++_code> .\prj_11_3.exeEnter target distance (q to quit): 50Enter step length: 2Enter the test num: 2the max step is: 315the min step is: 184the ave step is: 249.5Enter target distance (q to quit): 50Enter step length: 2Enter the test num: 2the max step is: 378the min step is: 196the ave step is: 287 11.4代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101// mytime.h#ifndef MYTIME_H_#define MYTIME_H_#include <iostream>class Time{ private: int hours; int minutes; public: Time(); Time(int h, int m=0); void AddMin(int m); void AddHr(int h); void Reset(int h=0, int m=0); friend Time operator+(const Time &t1, const Time &t2); friend Time operator-(const Time &t1, const Time &t2); friend Time operator*(const Time &t, double n); friend Time operator*(double m, const Time &t) {return t*m;} // inline definition, use t.operator(m) friend std::ostream & operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Time &t);};#endif// mytime.cpp #include "mytime.h"Time::Time(){ hours = minutes = 0;}Time::Time(int h, int m){ hours = h; minutes = m;}void Time::AddMin(int m){ minutes += m; hours += minutes/60; minutes %= 60;}void Time::AddHr(int h){ hours += h;}void Time::Reset(int h, int m){ hours = h; minutes = m;}Time operator+(const Time &t1, const Time &t2){ Time sum; sum.minutes = t1.minutes + t2.minutes; sum.hours = t1.hours + t2.hours + sum.minutes/60; sum.minutes %= 60; return sum;}Time operator-(const Time &t1, const Time &t2){ Time diff; int tot1, tot2; tot1 = t1.minutes + 60*t1.hours; tot2 = t2.minutes + 60*t2.hours; diff.minutes = (tot2 - tot1)%60; diff.hours = (tot2-tot1)/60; return diff;}Time operator*(const Time &t, double mult){ Time result; long totalminutes = t.hours*mult*60 + t.minutes*mult; result.hours = totalminutes/60; result.minutes = totalminutes%60; return result;}std::ostream & operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Time &t){ os << t.hours << " hours, " << t.minutes << " minutes"; return os;}// prj_11_4.cpp#include <iostream>#include "mytime.h"int main(){ using std::cout; using std::endl; Time aida(3, 35); Time tosca(2, 48); Time temp; cout << "Aida and Tosca:
"; cout << aida << "; " << tosca << endl; temp = aida + tosca; // operator+() cout << "Aida + Tosca: " << temp << endl; temp = aida*1.17; // member operator*() cout << "Aida * 1.17: " << temp << endl; cout << "10.0 * Tosca: " << 10.0*tosca << endl; return 0;} 运行结果123456PS E:\Buffer\C++_code> .\prj_11_4.exeAida and Tosca:3 hours, 35 minutes; 2 hours, 48 minutesAida + Tosca: 6 hours, 23 minutesAida * 1.17: 4 hours, 11 minutes10.0 * Tosca: 28 hours, 0 minutes 11.5代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103// stonewt.h#ifndef STONEWT_H_#define STONEWT_H_#include <iostream>class Stonewt{ public: enum Mode {STN, INT_LBS, DB_LBS}; private: static const int Lbs_per_stn = 14; // pounds per stone, 1stone(英石)=14lbs(磅) int stone; // whole stones double pds_left; // fractional pounds double pounds; // entire weight in pounds Mode status; public: Stonewt(double lbs, Mode m=STN); // constructor for double pounds Stonewt(int stn, double lbs, Mode m=STN); // constructor for stone, lbs Stonewt(); // default constructor ~Stonewt(); void set_stn() {status = STN;}; void set_int_lbs() {status = INT_LBS;}; void set_db_lbs() {status = DB_LBS;}; Stonewt operator+(const Stonewt &s) const; Stonewt operator-(const Stonewt &s) const; Stonewt operator*(double n) const; friend std::ostream & operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Stonewt &s); };#endif// stonewt.cpp#include <iostream>#include "stonewt.h"using std::cout;// construct Stonewt object from double valueStonewt::Stonewt(double lbs, Mode m){ stone = int(lbs)/Lbs_per_stn; pds_left = int(lbs) % Lbs_per_stn + lbs - int(lbs); // because double lbs pounds = lbs; status = m;}// construct Stonewt object from stone, double valuesStonewt::Stonewt(int stn, double lbs, Mode m){ stone = stn; pds_left = lbs; pounds = stn*Lbs_per_stn + lbs; status = m;}Stonewt::Stonewt() // default constructor, wt=0{ stone = pounds = pds_left = 0; status = STN;}Stonewt::~Stonewt() // destructor{}Stonewt Stonewt::operator+(const Stonewt &s) const{ return Stonewt(pounds + s.pounds);}Stonewt Stonewt::operator-(const Stonewt &s) const{ return Stonewt(pounds - s.pounds);}Stonewt Stonewt::operator*(double n) const{ return Stonewt(pounds * n);}std::ostream & operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Stonewt &s){ if (s.status == Stonewt::STN) os << s.stone << " stone, " << s.pds_left << " pounds
"; else if (s.status == Stonewt::DB_LBS) os << s.pounds << " db_pounds
"; else if (s.status == Stonewt::INT_LBS) os << int(s.pounds) << " int_pounds
"; return os;}// prj_11_5.cpp#include <iostream>#include "stonewt.h"using std::cout;using std::endl;int main(){ Stonewt s1; // 0 stone, 0 pounds Stonewt s2(1.5, Stonewt::DB_LBS); // 1.5 db_pounds Stonewt s3 = Stonewt(1, 0.5, Stonewt::INT_LBS); // 1*14+0.5 = 14.5 -> 14 ini_pounds cout << "initial s1: " << s1 << "initial s2: " << s2 << "initial s3: " << s3; s1 = s1 + s2; s1.set_db_lbs(); // 1.5 db_pounds cout << "s1 + s2(db_lbs): " << s1; s1.set_int_lbs(); cout << "s1 + s2(int_lbs): " << s1; cout << "s3 - s2: " << s3-s2; // 临时变量，默认 STN cout << "s1*2: " << s1*2; // 同上 return 0;} 运行结果12345678PS E:\Buffer\C++_code> .\prj_11_5.exeinitial s1: 0 stone, 0 poundsinitial s2: 1.5 db_poundsinitial s3: 14 int_poundss1 + s2(db_lbs): 1.5 db_poundss1 + s2(int_lbs): 1 int_poundss3 - s2: 0 stone, 13 poundss1*2: 0 stone, 3 pounds 11.6代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109// stonewt.h#ifndef STONEWT_H_#define STONEWT_H_#include <iostream>class Stonewt{ private: static const int Lbs_per_stn = 14; // pounds per stone, 1stone(英石)=14lbs(磅) int stone; // whole stones double pds_left; // fractional pounds double pounds; // entire weight in pounds public: Stonewt(double lbs); // constructor for double pounds Stonewt(int stn, double lbs); // constructor for stone, lbs Stonewt(); // default constructor ~Stonewt(); bool operator>(const Stonewt &s) const {return pounds > s.pounds;}; bool operator<(const Stonewt &s) const {return pounds < s.pounds;}; bool operator>=(const Stonewt &s) const {return pounds >= s.pounds;}; bool operator<=(const Stonewt &s) const {return pounds <= s.pounds;}; bool operator==(const Stonewt &s) const {return pounds == s.pounds;}; bool operator!=(const Stonewt &s) const {return pounds != s.pounds;}; void show_lbs() const; void show_stn() const; };#endif// stonewt.cpp#include <iostream>#include "stonewt.h"using std::cout;// construct Stonewt object from double valueStonewt::Stonewt(double lbs){ stone = int(lbs)/Lbs_per_stn; pds_left = int(lbs) % Lbs_per_stn + lbs - int(lbs); // because double lbs pounds = lbs;}// construct Stonewt object from stone, double valuesStonewt::Stonewt(int stn, double lbs){ stone = stn; pds_left = lbs; pounds = stn*Lbs_per_stn + lbs;}Stonewt::Stonewt() // default constructor, wt=0{ stone = pounds = pds_left = 0;}Stonewt::~Stonewt() // destructor{}void Stonewt::show_lbs() const{ cout << stone << " stone, " << pds_left << " pounds
";}void Stonewt::show_stn() const{ cout << pounds << " pounds
";}// prj_11_6.cpp#include <iostream>#include "stonewt.h"using std::cout;using std::endl;using std::cin;const int LEN = 6;int main(){ // Stonewt arr[LEN] = {1.5, 2.5, 3.5}; Stonewt arr[LEN] = { Stonewt(1, 0.5), Stonewt(2, 0.5), Stonewt(13, 0.5) }; double value_pounds; Stonewt max = arr[0]; Stonewt min = arr[0]; Stonewt ele = Stonewt(11, 0.0); int cnt=0; for (int i=3; i<LEN; ++i) { cout << "Enter the value: "; cin >> value_pounds; // 11*14 = 154 arr[i] = Stonewt(value_pounds); } for (int i=0; i<LEN; ++i) { if (arr[i] > max) max = arr[i]; else if (arr[i] < min) min = arr[i]; if(arr[i] >= ele) cnt++; } cout << "the max is: "; max.show_lbs(); cout << "the min is: "; min.show_lbs(); cout << "the num of value>=11 is: " << cnt << endl; return 0;} 运行结果1234567PS E:\Buffer\C++_code> .\prj_11_6.exeEnter the value: 154Enter the value: 200Enter the value: 14the max is: 14 stone, 4 poundsthe min is: 1 stone, 0 poundsthe num of value>=11 is: 3 11.7代码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107108109110111// complex0.h// a = (A, Bi), c = (C, Di)// addition: a+c = (A+C, (B+D)i)// Subtraction: a-c = (A-C, (B-C)i)// multiplication: a*c = (A*C-B*D, (A*D+B*C)i)// multiplication: x*c = (x*C, x*Di), x is real// Conjugate: ~a = (A, -Bi)#ifndef COMPLEX0_H_#define COMPLEX0_H_#include <iostream>class Complex{ private: double real; double imag; public: Complex(); Complex(double n, double m); ~Complex(); Complex operator+(const Complex &cmp) const; Complex operator-(const Complex &cmp) const; Complex operator*(const Complex &cmp) const; Complex operator~() const; friend Complex operator*(double n, const Complex &cmp); friend std::ostream & operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Complex &cmp); friend std::istream & operator>>(std::istream &os, Complex &cmp);};#endif// complex0.cpp//#include <iostream>#include "complex0.h"Complex::Complex(){ real = 0.0; imag = 0.0;}Complex::Complex(double n, double m){ real = n; imag = m;}Complex::~Complex(){}// addition: a+c = (A+C, (B+D)i)Complex Complex::operator+(const Complex &cmp) const{ return Complex(real+cmp.real, imag+cmp.imag);}// Subtraction: a-c = (A-C, (B-C)i)Complex Complex::operator-(const Complex &cmp) const{ return Complex(real-cmp.real, imag-cmp.imag);}// multiplication: a*c = (A*C-B*D, (A*D+B*C)i)Complex Complex::operator*(const Complex &cmp) const{ Complex mul; mul.real = real*cmp.real - imag*cmp.imag; mul.imag = real*cmp.imag + imag*cmp.real; return mul;}// multiplication: x*c = (x*C, x*Di), x is realComplex operator*(double n, const Complex &cmp){ return Complex(n*cmp.real, n*cmp.imag);}// Conjugate: ~a = (A, -Bi)Complex Complex::operator~() const{ return Complex(real, -imag);}std::ostream & operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Complex &cmp){ os << "(" << cmp.real << ", " << cmp.imag << "i)"; return os;}std::istream & operator>>(std::istream &is, Complex &cmp) // 输入不能 const{ std::cout << "real: "; is >> cmp.real; if (!is) // 如果不加，最后输入 q 的时候，还会在输出 imaginary: return is; std::cout << "imaginary: "; is >> cmp.imag; return is;}// prj_11_7.cpp#include <iostream>#include "complex0.h" // to avoid confusion with complex.husing namespace std;int main(){ Complex a(3.0, 4.0); // initialize to (3,4i) Complex c; cout << "Enter a complex number (q to quit):
"; while (cin >> c) { cout << "c is " << c << "
"; cout << "complex conjugate is " << ~c << "
"; cout << "a is " << a << "
"; cout << "a + c is " << a+c << "
"; cout << "a - c is " << a-c << "
"; cout << "a * c is " << a*c << "
"; cout << "2 * c is " << 2*c << "
"; cout << "Enter a comlex number (q to quit):
"; } cout << "Done!
"; return 0;} 运行结果1234567891011121314PS E:\Buffer\C++_code> .\prj_11_7.exeEnter a complex number (q to quit):real: 10imaginary: 12c is (10, 12i)complex conjugate is (10, -12i)a is (3, 4i)a + c is (13, 16i)a - c is (-7, -8i)a * c is (-18, 76i)2 * c is (20, 24i)Enter a comlex number (q to quit):real: qDone!

entry.title: 矩阵求导
entry.content: 【 The latest data ： 2018/04/23 】Yuchen 详见此链接：https://blog.csdn.net/nomadlx53/article/details/50849941 1.前提若 $x$ 为向量，则默认 $x$ 为列向量，$x^T$ 为行向量。 2.布局布局简单地理解就是分子 $y$ 、分母 $x$ 是行向量还是列向量。 分子布局（Numerator-layout）： 分子为 $y$ 或者分母为 $x^T$ (即，分子为列向量或者分母为行向量) 分母布局（Denominator-layout）： 分子为 $y^T$ 或者分母为 $x$ (即，分子为行向量或者分母为列向量) 为了更加深刻地理解两种布局的特点和区别，下面是从维基百科中布局部分拿来的例子：

entry.title: fix hexo 加密 bug
entry.content: 之前安装了 hexo-blog-encrypt 对博文进行加密。安装方法详见https://github.com/MikeCoder/hexo-blog-encrypt感谢作者的贡献！ 但是最近我新建加密文档之后，在输入密码的时候出现了如下情况： 输入正确密码并点击回车键没任何反应 输入错误密码没有错误提示 发现在 1/node_modules/hexo-blog-encrypt/templat.html 文件中，引用了第三方 jQuery 文件。templat.html 代码如下：12345678910111213<script src="//cdn.bootcss.com/jquery/1.11.3/jquery.min.js"></script><div id="hbe-security"> <div class="hbe-input-container"> <input type="password" class="hbe-form-control" id="pass" placeholder="{{message}}" /> <label for="pass">{{message}}</label> <div class="bottom-line"></div> </div></div><div id="decryptionError" style="display: none;">{{decryptionError}}</div><div id="noContentError" style="display: none;">{{noContentError}}</div><div id="encrypt-blog" style="display:none">{{content}}</div> 于是我在https://cdnjs.com/libraries/jquery里找到了 templat.html 中所使用的 1.11.3 版本，发现之前链接有所改动，导致加载不出来第三方 jQuery 文件。我将 templat.html 中的 1<script src="//cdn.bootcss.com/jquery/1.11.3/jquery.min.js"></script> 改成了 1<script src="//cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery/1.11.3/jquery.min.js"></script> 原因应该是 第三方库信息更改，之后就 hexo clean & g & d 就 ok 了。有兴趣的可以看下相关链接的源码：https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery/1.11.3/jquery.min.js
